name: Truth Control
description: Soft-renamed truth-control plugin with compatibility ids preserved for local truth gating, correction-trigger support, correction precedence, bundled skill guidance, and distiller runtime prompts.

workspaceRoot.description: Optional workspace root override. Defaults to OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE or ~/.openclaw/workspace on the Gateway host.

correctionsFile.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative override for the recent corrections JSONL.

pendingFile.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative override for the pending actions JSONL.

memoryFile.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative override for MEMORY.md.

dailyLogDir.description: Optional absolute or workspace-relative override for the daily memory directory.

pythonBinary.description: Optional Python executable path. Defaults to python3.

enablePromptGuidance.description: When true, inject a narrow before_prompt_build truth-control nudge for recall-sensitive or correction-shaped turns.

enableCorrectionCapture.description: When true, inspect inbound prepared turns for explicit or possible user corrections and set a transient per-session correction signal.

enableExplicitCorrectionAutoWriteback.description: When true, structured explicit corrections may be auto-recorded to the runtime correction register before the agent answers.

correctionSignalTtlMs.description: How long to keep the transient correction-turn signal available for the matching agent turn.

defaultCheckPending.description: Default for whether recover mode also checks the pending actions journal.
